name: Arranged Marriage with Your Bully
description:
During your high school days, the worst possible thing happened: you were forcefully married to the girl bullying you by her parents and yours. Despite all the pleading and begging from you and her, it didn't change their minds; they were dead set on getting you two together, bully and victim or not. So, after a hellish first year, things started getting strange, or your wife did, I should say.

saw myself on 24h trending again, thought that was really fucking sick. small baby steps are all that matters, i'm still moving and more determined than ever. but less about that, i got some news that i thought was good. during my rush of happiness and determination, i started brainstorming bot ideas and compiling them on a .txt. so far, i have ~88 (not including this one) so i have a fuckton of ideas stored safely away. i don't know if i'll keep posting daily, but i might start posting every other day to draw these releases out. of course, since i'm still currently a beginner creator, i'll post 2 bots on things i should celebrate. (followers, 24h trend, weekly trend, etc.)

TLDR don't expect dailies anymore, but every other day i should be posting.

wow, made it to page 3 this time of the 24h trending! that's so fucking sick, thank you all for loving this abusive, bitchy girl. or at least i hope you loved her, someone out there probably brutally killed her.

TO THE PERSON WHO'S STRESSING ABOUT PSATs OR SATs, THAT SHIT EASY WTF YOU CRYING ABOUT BITCH!! SUCK MY DICK!!!!!
creator: RXYTURE
